description: yang-toolkit observability hooks: log tool calls, track current agent, append ledger summaries, and passively record nested-folder CLAUDE.md gap candidates.
_comment_planned: TODO: add UserPromptSubmit (capture intent), PostToolUseFailure (capture failures), Setup (warm directory create) once base flow is verified.

PostToolUse._comment: Passive CLAUDE.md gap detector: on Edit/Write/MultiEdit in a nested folder, score the folder against the heuristic and append a pending candidate to .claude/state/claude-md-candidates.jsonl. NEVER generates a CLAUDE.md -- /claude-md-gaps handles that, gated on user confirmation.
